title: Deploy and manage Azure Arc-enabled Servers
summary: In this learning path, you're introduced to Azure Arc-enabled servers. You'll cover Arc-enabled server deployment, updates to Arc-enabled servers using Azure Update Manager and configuring Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers. (AZ-1010)

sections.title: Deploy and manage Azure Arc-enabled Servers
sections.summary: In this learning path, you're introduced to Azure Arc-enabled servers. You'll cover Arc-enabled server deployment, updates to Arc-enabled servers using Azure Update Manager and configuring Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers. (AZ-1010)

lessons.title: Plan and deploy Azure Arc-enabled servers at scale
lessons.content_md:
Understand the capabilities and architecture of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn how to test and select the right deployment method for your machines. Finally, adopt best practices and advanced security considerations for Azure Arc-enabled servers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-deploy-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and deploy Azure Arc-enabled servers at scale

lessons.title: Govern your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
Understand the governance capabilities of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn about the benefits of and how to onboard Azure Arc-enabled servers to Azure Policy, Azure Automation, and Azure Automanage.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/govern-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Govern your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers

lessons.title: Configure updates of Azure Arc-enabled servers by using Azure Update Manager
lessons.content_md:
Update Manager  is a unified service that helps manage and govern updates for all your machines. It allows you to monitor Windows and Linux update compliance across Azure and on-premises from a single dashboard.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-updates-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure updates of Azure Arc-enabled servers by using Azure Update Manager

lessons.title: Configure Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
By the end of this module, you'll understand how Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers can help you protect your cloud-based applications from various cyber threats.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-defender-cloud-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers

lessons.title: Manage Azure Arc-enabled servers by using scripting
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the topic of enabling Azure Arc for Windows or Linux machines in your environment. Enabling Arc-enabled servers is done either manually or by using an automated method with a provided template script.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-azure-arc-enabled-servers-scripting/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Azure Arc-enabled servers by using scripting

lessons.title: Guided exercise - Manage on-premises Windows servers by using Azure Arc
lessons.content_md:
In this guided exercise, you practice onboarding, securing, monitoring, and updating on-premises Windows servers by using Azure Arc. The guided exercise combines both learning and hands-on practice.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-exercise-manage-on-premises-azure-arc/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided exercise - Manage on-premises Windows servers by using Azure Arc

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and manage Azure Arc-enabled Servers
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and manage Azure Arc-enabled Servers**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
